code: import React,{useMemo}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const StarsBackground=()=>{const stars=useMemo(()=>{return Array.from({length:80},(_,i)=>({id:i,left:"".concat(Math.random()*100,"%"),top:"".concat(Math.random()*100,"%"),size:Math.random()*3+1,duration:"".concat(Math.random()*3+2,"s"),delay:"".concat(Math.random()*3,"s"),opacity:Math.random()*0.5+0.2}));},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stars-bg",children:stars.map(star=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"star",style:{left:star.left,top:star.top,width:star.size,height:star.size,opacity:star.opacity,'--duration':star.duration,animationDelay:star.delay}},star.id))});};export default StarsBackground;
